old_title: Sports - Tour de France : Merlier the fastest again, Pogacar still in yellow
new_title: Sports - Tour de France: Merlier speeds toward another win, Pogacar still in yellow
old_text:
Tour de France : Merlier the fastest again, Pogacar still in yellow
Issued on:
The Belgian took victory in Stage 12 of the Tour de France in Chalon-sur-Saône, claiming his third stage win of this year's Tour. He edged out Olav Kooij and Jasper Philipsen.
Meanwhile, Argentina and Spain continue their preparations for Sunday's World Cup final. Tomorrow, France and England will face off in Miami for the third-place play-off.
In golf, American Jackson Suber leads the Open Championship after the opening round.
